articles.title: 散光一定不要用深色模式

articles.title: 从绿皮车帖子感叹祖国的发展真是日新月异
articles.excerpt: 刚才看到个佬友的帖子在吐槽绿皮车体验太差了。作为一个老登，突然有点唏嘘。中国发展的太快了，现在的年轻人生活已经很幸福了，但是中国发展还很不平衡，所以年轻佬友们偶尔体验到二三十年前的生活水平时，一时间接受不了，很正常，差距确实太大了。 高铁出现前，全中国都是绿皮车，最快的就是Z字头的直达车了，其次是T特快，再次是K普快，其实车速都差不多，顶天120km/h，区别在于中途停站的多少，要不要让车。 当年我上大学的时候，从家（安徽）到学校（北京）只有两趟K车，单程12-14个小时，学校可以帮忙订票，但是一是提前特别早要定下来具体日期，二是根本订不到卧铺，错过学校订票时间，再想买票要去火车站或者代理售票

articles.title: CalVerT: Augmenting Agents with Calibrated Verifier Telemetry Improves Action and Learning in Knowledge-Intensive Tasks
articles.excerpt: LLM agents in knowledge intensive question answering take retrieval and reasoning actions with incomplete knowledge about whether their current answer is uncertain, unsupported, or already complete. This produces two failure modes: committing to confident but unsupported answers, which hurts accuracy, and over-retrieving when the evidence in hand already suffices, resulting in wasted compute. To g
articles.summary: 知识密集型问答中LLM智能体常因不确定答案而错误自信或过度检索，CalVerT通过校准验证器遥测技术指导智能体何时停止检索或修正答案，提升准确率并节省计算资源。

articles.title: World Action Models: A Survey
articles.excerpt: World Action Models (WAMs) are embodied predictive-action models that make a forecast of the future available to action. Recent WAMs repurpose large video generation models, and a parallel line relies on language or vision-language backbones without a video-generation core. This rapid expansion has blurred the boundary among broad world models, video generation models, action-grounded video world
articles.summary: 综述世界动作模型（WAM），一类通过预测未来辅助行动的具身模型。梳理了基于视频生成模型与语言/视觉语言主干的两条技术路线，并探讨了当前发展边界。

articles.title: Current World Models Lack a Persistent State Core
articles.excerpt: World models are increasingly regarded as a decisive step toward artificial general intelligence, yet modeling the physical world demands more than rendering convincing frames on demand: it requires an internal world state that keeps evolving over time, decoupled from observation, so that objects endure and events run to their conclusions whether or not a camera is watching, much as the moon holds
articles.summary: 指出当前世界模型缺乏与观察解耦的持久内部状态核心，无法保证对象持续存在和事件连贯运行，强调构建随时间独立演化的世界状态对实现通用人工智能至关重要。
